description_long: This is a large, freestanding cabinet with a classic, rectangular design, featuring a two-part structure. The upper section consists of three glass-paneled doors with visible shelving inside, ideal for displaying items while protecting them from dust. The lower section includes two solid doors on either side and a central column of four drawers, each with brass handles, providing ample concealed storage. The cabinet is painted in a uniform light gray or off-white color, with subtle molding details along the top and base for a refined appearance. The handles and hardware are metallic, likely brass or a similar alloy, adding a touch of elegance. The overall build suggests it is made primarily of wood, with glass panels in the upper doors and metal hardware.
description: A large, classic freestanding cabinet with glass-paneled upper doors, solid lower doors, and central drawers, finished in light gray with brass hardware.
description_view_0: Front view showing three glass-paneled upper doors, two solid lower doors, and four central drawers with brass handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth and the stepped profile of the upper and lower sections.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid back with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the depth and stepped profile seen in view 1.
